title.en: When the time comes, other forces will be even ...

content.en:
The law of the jungle is the rule of this world, and Ye Tian can't break this rule.

Even if he gave an order, the forces where these top domain ancestors were located would no longer occupy the territory of other forces, but there would definitely be a secret method.

When the time comes, other forces will be even worse.

Unless he really destroys these forces, he will never be able to put an end to this kind of thing.

Moreover, he destroyed these forces, and there were others.

In short, he couldn't completely change the situation in the Daoshan Realm.

Whoever is strong will occupy more territory, and whoever is weak will either give up their territory or take refuge in other powerful forces.

Ye Tian could guarantee the stability of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, but he couldn't guarantee the stability of the Dao Mountain Realm.

Therefore, he would allow these forces to occupy the territory of the Daoshan Realm.

As long as he doesn't do too much, he won't ask.

But if it goes too far, he will still intervene.

Dividing up the territory is only one of the discussion points in this meeting, and many top domain ancestors also have a content to discuss, that is, to form the Ancestral Alliance.

There is also an Ancestral Alliance in the Divine Heaven Realm, but as they move to the Dao Mountain Realm, the former territory is gone, the treasure land is gone, and many rules are not suitable for the current Dao Mountain Realm, so the Ancestral Alliance naturally needs to be re-established.

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors, we want to form an Ancestral Alliance and set a rule, which will help the development of the Dao Mountain Realm. "

The Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor spoke.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded, and agreed.

"The leader of the Ancestral Alliance will be served by you, the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Law Domain!"

A top domain ancestor pleaded.

One day when Ye Tian is here, they don't dare to serve as the leader of the Ancestral Alliance, and they are not qualified to do so!

Ye Tian also knew that there was nothing to do with this kind of ancestral alliance, and it was estimated that it would take a long time to start a meeting, so he would not delay the time, so he agreed to serve as the leader of the ancestral alliance.

Subsequently, many top domain ancestors began to set a rule.

For example, the Domain Ancestor cannot take action at will against the creatures under the Domain Ancestor, once it is discovered, the Ancestral Alliance will directly sanction that Domain Ancestor.

The Ancestral Alliance of the Divine Heaven Realm also has this rule, and it is precisely because of this provision that the Ancestor of the Vast Sea Region did not dare to attack the Black Wind Mountain, lest he be caught by the Ancestral Alliance.

It is precisely because of this provision that the Dao Ancestors can develop and will not worry about being killed by the Domain Ancestors one day.

There are also encounters with foreign enemies, mutual assistance and resistance to foreign enemies.

For example, against the Devourers, against the Forbidden Creatures, and so on.

Subsequently.

This provision was formulated, and a new rule of the Ancestral Alliance was formulated, and it was passed on to all the domain ancestors in the Daoshan Realm one by one.

Any domain ancestor must have a name in the Ancestral League, and may not participate in the tasks or affairs of the Ancestral League, but must be named and know the rules of the Ancestral League.

Since the establishment of the Ancestral Alliance, the Daoshan Realm has stabilized.

Moreover, the forces established by those top domain ancestors continued to expand their power, and some non-domain ancestor forces continued to give up their territory, and in the end they could only take refuge in those top domain ancestor forces or merge with each other, becoming small organizations that barely survived.

The speed at which the human race grew faster and faster, with Ye Tian as a backer, they had almost no enemies, and even many, many times faster than the development speed of Black Wind Mountain.

At the beginning, the domain ancestor of the human race was only Ye Tian's family.

But gradually, as Ye Tian built many cultivation treasures, and even took out treasures and opportunities that were beneficial to breaking through the domain ancestor, some geniuses of the human race broke through to the realm of the domain ancestor with the help of Ye Tian's chance.

For example, some of the leaders of the Nine Extremes Legion have become domain ancestors one after another, and some of the Terran Temple guardians have also become domain ancestors.

However, it is very difficult for the human race to give birth to an elite domain ancestor, and it will take a long time.

------------------

After the establishment of the Ancestral League, Ye Tian didn't care about it, anyway, it wasn't a big deal, and he didn't need to come forward.

After returning to the human realm, he began to practice in retreat.

In terms of cultivation, he has already reached the consummation realm of the ordinary domain body, and he cannot complete a transformation and promotion to the elite domain body in a short period of time, so as to become an elite domain ancestor, but he can continue to improve in other aspects.

For example, holy skills.

When he returned to the One Realm, it was difficult for him to cultivate a holy technique to the consummation realm, and he had to use the Ancestor Method to cultivate a holy technique to the consummation realm.

But now, he has broken through to the Domain Ancestor, and even if he doesn't have the Ancestor Method, he still has the hope of cultivating a Sect Saint Technique to the consummation realm.

Moreover, he had obtained a lot of holy skills from the Battle Gate, and some of them had not yet begun to cultivate.

As a result, Ye Tian began to cultivate this sect holy technique, such as the Eternal Holy Technique, which is a time holy technique.

With the passage of time, a holy technique was cultivated to the Dacheng realm by Ye Tian, and it didn't take long, and it took a hundred thousand years at most for a holy technique to be cultivated to the Dacheng realm.

This is one of the changes brought about after breaking through to the Domain Ancestor level.

If he was still at the level of the Returning Realm, the speed at which he comprehended the Holy Technique would not be so fast.

In the following days, Ye Tian mainly specialized in cultivating the Imperial Body Holy Technique, this was a rare amplification holy skill, if it was cultivated to the consummation realm, the amplification effect on other holy skills and his own strength would be very huge.

Therefore, cultivating this holy skill will help you improve your strength the most.

Of course, even if you break through to the realm of domain ancestors, if you want to rely on yourself to cultivate a holy technique to the consummation realm, the difficulty is also very huge, and it will take a long time.

In the blink of an eye, millions of years have passed.

Ye Tian had made some progress in the Imperial Body Saint Technique, but he still hadn't cultivated it to the Consummation Realm, which showed how difficult it was to cultivate a Saint Technique to the Consummation Realm.

Of course, if he was given a few million more years, he would probably be able to cultivate this holy technique to the consummation realm.

But this day.

There was news from the Ancestors of the Ancestral Alliance, they had discovered a Devouring Clan Domain Ancestor.

As soon as the other party entered the Daoshan realm, he was discovered.

Fortunately, the other party's strength was not strong, and he was just an ordinary domain ancestor, so he was instantly captured by an elite domain ancestor.

But then, the news that came out of the interrogation of this ordinary domain ancestor made the ancestral alliance panic.

----------------

The headquarters of the Ancestral Alliance is located in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, and a single Forbidden Void Realm has been built into the headquarters of the Ancestral Alliance, where many domain ancestors have been stationed for a long time.

Soon, Ye Tian descended here.

"Alliance Leader!"

"Alliance Leader!"

"Alliance Leader!"

A domain ancestor said respectfully.

"Bring that Devouring Clan Ancestor with you!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes!"

Several domain ancestors brought up the Devouring Clan Domain Ancestor who had sealed the cultivation and threw it in front of Ye Tian.
